summary: Coach Watch V2 Auto-Insight feature testing complete. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend CoachWatchCardV2 component renders correctly with all required elements: status chip, confidence badge, headline, recommended action with icon, AI insight section, and signals list.
seed_data_creation: Used existing Stanford program data with coach reply and campus visit signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Watch V2 Auto-Insight testing complete (iteration 236). All 8 features verified: (1) POST /api/ai/auto-insight returns correct contract with state, headline, recommended_action, recommended_action_text, confidence, ai.insight, ai.urgency, signals array - PASS, (2) Auto-insight caching works (second call returns cached result) - PASS, (3) Cache invalidation on new interaction - PASS (cache cleared when posting interaction), (4) POST /api/ai/next-step includes Coach Watch context - PASS (returns valid JSON with next_step, urgency), (5) POST /api/ai/journey-summary includes Coach Watch context - PASS (returns valid JSON with relationship_summary), (6) CoachWatchCardV2 renders on Journey page with all elements - PASS (status chip, confidence badge, headline, recommended action with icon, AI insight section, signals list), (7) Old CoachWatchCard replaced by V2 - PASS (no duplicate cards), (8) School Intelligence drawer button works - PASS. Key test IDs: coach-watch-v2, cw2-status-chip, cw2-confidence, cw2-headline, cw2-action, cw2-ai-insight, cw2-signals, coach-watch-v2-skeleton, si-compact-preview, ai-school-insight-btn. Stanford shows 'Hot' state with 'High confidence' and AI insight about coach reply and campus visit.
